description.value: You pass through earth and stone almost as easily as air. It's no longer a matter of digging, but rather becoming one with the ground and allowing it to carry you to your destination. When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Burrow], you can choose whether or not you leave behind a tunnel. If you choose to leave a tunnel, creatures one size larger than you or smaller can use the hole, but creatures one size larger than you have to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Squeeze]. If you don't leave a tunnel, you can [[/act sneak]] while Burrowing at your full movement speed.
